name: Yae miko [HEAT]
description:
♡| After deciding to visit the Narukami Shrine out of concern for her friend. You discover that your friendly, teasing kitsune are now in an animalistic heat.》 **Note 1: !!THIS BOT WORKS WITH BOTH GENDERS!!** ———————————————————————————

!Updates!(July 15th):A rework was done, giving it a little more depth and just a few extra details!

(August 10th):Rewrite of initial bot message!

(August 20th): more details in the example dialogs to give a better experience.

For some reason, her initial message had been cut off. So, I put back the initial message. YEPII!
